name: STORES
description: Heycan Incs Japanese commerce OS — online store, POS, reservations, payments with growing developer API.

seo.title: STORES — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: STORES: Heycan Incs Japanese commerce OS — online store, POS, reservations, payments with growing developer API.

when_to_use: Japanese omnichannel commerce with POS and online store
Reservation and payment system for Japanese service business
Storefront with growing developer API for custom integrations
POS-connected online store for Japanese brick-and-mortar shop
Commerce OS integration for payments and inventory automation

pros: All-in-one commerce OS tuned for Japan
POS, online, and reservations in one
cons: API still maturing compared to Shopify
review.verdict: The pragmatic Shopify alternative for Japanese SMBs bundling POS and online, if you don't need global reach.
review.best_for: Japanese SMBs running both physical and online stores with reservations or bookings
review.not_for: International merchants or developers wanting Shopify-level ecosystem and API depth
